final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(omrade) AS wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

3.sql: SELECT objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna LIMIT 1;

4.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to municipality extent (intersection)

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced storm-surge polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid (distinct parcels)

       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy

WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_AsText(omrade) AS wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

3.sql:
SELECT objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons reduced to Kristiansand extent using municipality geometry from step 1

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per parcel (teigid) and keep matrikkelnummertekst
